WPEPlatformViewunlock_pointer

Declaration [src] 

gboolean
unlock_pointer (
  WPEView* view
)

Description [src]

Unlock the pointer in view if it has been locked.

Return value

Type: gboolean

TRUE if the pointer is unlocked, or FALSE otherwise.
